title: jacquemontia sphaerocephala
intro: Jacquemontia sphaerocephala, also known as the round-headed Jacquemontia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the morning glory family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and relieving pain. Jacquemontia sphaerocephala can be prepared as a tea or infusion for its herbal remedies, and it is also used in some parts of the world as a natural dye.
